description: M-25-21 §5 Runtime Behavioral Attestation fixture: pre-deployment evidence, ongoing monitoring framework, agentic risk assessment, vendor evidence evaluation, and human oversight documentation; synthetic federal AI scenarios only.
notes: judge evaluator required for RBA determination quality — threshold design, agentic risk, vendor evidence
golden_threshold: 0.75 — allows variation in M-25-21 §5 practice enumeration order and threshold values
RBA fields added: aibom_refs, validity_scope (until_model_update), rba_determination_threshold (0.80)
This bundle is the behavioral evidence complement to aibom-auditor: AIBOM=inventory, m25-21-rba=behavior
M-25-21 high-impact scoping (case 5) is the critical gate — §5 practices apply only to high-impact use cases
Independent evaluation != vendor documentation (case 6) is the most common M-25-21 compliance gap
certification_track=candidate; advance to stable after N=5 carousel runs with <10% rubric variance
Hashes: re-run `agentcarousel bundle pack fixtures/bundles/m25-21-rba` after file changes
open_items: OI-001: Compute and replace sha256 placeholders after initial bundle pack
OI-002: Advance to stable certification track after carousel runs
